articles.title_en: Vietnam's MONRE Confirms Completion of Key Ho Chi Minh City Wastewater Treatment Phase
articles.summary_en: MONRE confirmed Binh Hung WWTP Phase 3 completed, significantly boosting HCMC wastewater capacity.

articles.title_en: MONRE Secures $500M ADB Loan for National Wastewater Management Program 2026-2030
articles.summary_en: MONRE secured $500M ADB loan for national wastewater program, targeting 80% urban treatment by 2030.

articles.title_en: Vietnam's MONRE Pilots Smart Water Grid for Enhanced Wastewater Treatment Efficiency
articles.summary_en: MONRE pilots smart water grids in Da Nang and Hai Phong, using AI/IoT for optimized wastewater treatment.

articles.title_en: Vietnam Grapples with Early Enforcement of Mandatory Waste Sorting
articles.summary_en: Reports from early 2026 indicate mixed success in enforcing Vietnam's nationwide household waste sorting mandate. Infrastructure gaps and compliance challenges persist, with local authorities initiating pilot penalty schemes for non-compliance.

articles.title_en: Producers Navigate Complexities as Vietnam's EPR Scheme for Packaging Kicks Off
articles.summary_en: January 2026 marks the official start of EPR in Vietnam for packaging. Businesses face hurdles meeting targets and obligations, with industry groups calling for clearer guidelines and support amid the new environmental law.

articles.title_en: International Investors Eye Vietnam's Waste-to-Energy Sector Amidst Stricter Regulations
articles.summary_en: Stricter waste management regulations in Vietnam by 2026 are attracting foreign investors to waste-to-energy and advanced recycling. The demand for sustainable infrastructure solutions is creating a lucrative market as environmental standards are enforced.

articles.title_en: ADB Approves Major Loan for Vietnam's Sustainable Urban Development
articles.summary_en: ADB greenlights substantial funding for Vietnam's smart city and public transport initiatives in key urban centers.

articles.title_en: Vietnam Secures ADB Funds for Renewable Energy Transition and Climate Resilience
articles.summary_en: Asian Development Bank approves new loan tranche supporting Vietnam's ambitious renewable energy goals and climate adaptation.

articles.title_en: ADB Backs Vietnam's Digital Transformation and Regional Connectivity Projects
articles.summary_en: Loan approval targets enhancing Vietnam's digital infrastructure and cross-border transport links to boost trade.

articles.title_en: ADB-Backed Project Delivers Clean Water to Millions in Rural Vietnam by 2026
articles.summary_en: A key phase of an ADB-funded initiative has brought potable water and improved sanitation to over 2 million Vietnamese in rural areas, significantly reducing waterborne diseases.

articles.title_en: Vietnam Secures Fresh ADB Funds for Advanced Urban Wastewater Treatment in 2026
articles.summary_en: ADB and Vietnam partner on a new phase to upgrade urban wastewater infrastructure, targeting climate resilience and enhanced environmental health in major cities.

articles.title_en: ADB Partnership Continues to Drive Vietnam's 2026 Clean Water Sector Growth
articles.summary_en: As Vietnam progresses towards its sustainable development goals, the ADB reiterates its commitment, supporting new initiatives and ongoing programs in clean water and sanitation nationwide.

articles.title_en: World Bank Hails Vietnam's Water Sector Progress Amidst Climate Challenges in 2026
articles.summary_en: A new report highlights significant strides in climate-resilient water supply, benefiting millions across Vietnam.

articles.title_en: Mekong Delta Fortifies Water Security with World Bank Climate Funding in 2026
articles.summary_en: A major World Bank-backed project drastically improves water access and climate resilience for vulnerable communities.

articles.title_en: Vietnam's Sustainable Water Management Key to 2030 Climate Goals, World Bank Confirms
articles.summary_en: World Bank-supported initiatives lay groundwork for long-term water security and environmental health.

articles.title_en: JICA Pledges Significant ODA Loan for Hanoi Metro Line 5's Eco-Friendly Expansion in 2026
articles.summary_en: JICA commits substantial ODA loan in 2026 for Hanoi Metro Line 5 extension, focusing on green technology and urban sustainability.

articles.title_en: Vietnam Secures JICA Grant for New Mekong Delta Climate Resilience Program Starting 2026
articles.summary_en: A new JICA grant aids Vietnam's Mekong Delta with critical infrastructure for climate adaptation and sustainable water management.

articles.title_en: JICA Loans Support Smart Waste Management Infrastructure in Major Vietnamese Cities by 2026
articles.summary_en: JICA approves new loans to enhance smart waste collection and processing infrastructure, promoting urban environmental health.

articles.title_en: Vietnam's Q1 2026 FDI Soars, Fuelling New Industrial Park Expansion and Logistics Upgrades
articles.summary_en: Vietnam reports robust Q1 2026 FDI, driving substantial expansion of industrial parks and critical logistics infrastructure nationwide.

articles.title_en: Green Industrial Parks Gain Traction as Vietnam Prioritizes Sustainable FDI in 2026
articles.summary_en: Vietnam sees increasing FDI in green industrial parks, driven by new environmental policies and investor demand for sustainability.

articles.title_en: Vietnam's Infrastructure Master Plan 2026-2030 Unveiled, Boosting Connectivity for Industrial Zones
articles.summary_en: Vietnam launches a new master plan for 2026-2030, investing billions in transport, energy, and digital infrastructure for industrial zones.

articles.title_en: Vietnam's PDP8 Driving Rapid Renewable Energy Expansion by 2026
articles.summary_en: PDP8 fuels Vietnam's major renewable energy growth. Foreign investment in solar/wind projects accelerates coal reduction by 2026.

articles.title_en: Landmark Offshore Wind Projects Breakthrough in Vietnam Under PDP8
articles.summary_en: PDP8 fuels Vietnam's offshore wind. Major projects secure permits, financing; construction begins towards ambitious 2030 targets.

articles.title_en: Vietnam's Solar Sector Rebounds with Grid Upgrades and Storage Integration
articles.summary_en: Vietnam's solar power rebounds via PDP8. Grid upgrades and storage pilots ensure stable integration, avoiding oversupply by 2026.

articles.title_en: Long Thanh International Airport Phase 1 Begins Critical Operational Readiness Testing
articles.summary_en: Vietnam's new Long Thanh International Airport Phase 1 initiates crucial operational readiness testing in Q4 2026, moving closer to its 2027 full launch.

articles.title_en: Strategic Expressways Connecting to Long Thanh Airport See 80% Completion
articles.summary_en: Key expressways, including Bien Hoa-Vung Tau and HCMC-Long Thanh-Dau Giay expansion, achieve 80% completion, enhancing access to Long Thanh Airport by 2026.

articles.title_en: HCMC-Long Thanh Airport Rail Link Feasibility Study Kicks Off Amidst Growing Demand
articles.summary_en: A comprehensive feasibility study for a high-speed rail link connecting Ho Chi Minh City to Long Thanh Airport has officially commenced.

articles.title_en: Ho Chi Minh City's Advanced IOC Fully Operational, Revolutionizing Urban Management
articles.summary_en: HCMC's new AI-powered Integrated Operations Center is now fully active, streamlining traffic, public safety, and city services.

articles.title_en: Vietnam Unveils Ambitious 2030 Digital Infrastructure Plan for Smart Cities
articles.summary_en: The Vietnamese government announced a strategic plan to bolster 5G, IoT, and cloud infrastructure nationwide for smart cities by 2030.

articles.title_en: Da Nang Leverages AI & Big Data in New Smart City Operations Center
articles.summary_en: Da Nang launches its enhanced IOC, utilizing AI and big data analytics for predictive urban management and improved citizen services.
